field.title: geo_url
field.guid_formula:
IF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'bali') THEN
    "Bali"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'dubai') THEN
    "Dubai"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'dhabi') THEN
    "Abu-Dhabi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'moscow') AND NOT ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'elite') THEN
    "Moscow"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'moscow-elite') THEN
    "Moscow Elite"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'phuket') THEN
    "Phuket"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'batumi') THEN
    "Batumi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'cyprus') THEN
    "Cyprus"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'thai') THEN
    "Thailand"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'uae') THEN
    "UAE"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'sochi') THEN
    "Sochi"
END
field.formula:
IF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'bali') THEN
    "Bali"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'dubai') THEN
    "Dubai"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'dhabi') THEN
    "Abu-Dhabi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'moscow') AND NOT ICONTAINS([referrer], 'elite') THEN
    "Moscow"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'moscow-elite') THEN
    "Moscow Elite"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'phuket') THEN
    "Phuket"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'batumi') THEN
    "Batumi"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'cyprus') THEN
    "Cyprus"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'thai') THEN
    "Thailand"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'uae') THEN
    "UAE"
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer], 'sochi') THEN
    "Sochi"
END

field.title: CRQ
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([leads_id_9xp4]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_8mx1]) / COUNTD([leads_id_9xp4]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_8mx1]) / COUNTD([leads_id_9xp4])
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([leads_id]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([leads_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([leads_id])
END

field.title: Период
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN 
    [creation_date_3oqi]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date_3oqi], 'month')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date_3oqi], 'year')
END
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN 
    [creation_date]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date], 'month')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date], 'year')
END

field.title: Типы страниц
field.guid_formula:
IF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/uae/dubai')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'kak-vybrat-nedvizhimost-v-dubae-chtoby-poluchat-dohodnost-6-12-godovyh')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'dubai-real-estate-investment-in-2025-high-yields-and-golden-visa-opportunities')
THEN
    "Pillar Dubai"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/indonesia/bali')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'investitsii-v-nedvizhimost-na-bali-v-2025-godu-osobennosti-rayony-plyusy-i-minusy')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'bali-property-market-in-2025-prices-from-80000-and-rental-yields-up-to-16')
THEN
    "Pillar Bali"

-- Promo Moscow (ИМЕННО ВЫШЕ Pillar Moscow, иначе будет конфликт по подстроке "/moscow")
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/russia/moscow-elite')
THEN
    "Promo Moscow"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/russia/moscow-new-constructions')
THEN
    "Promo Moscow"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/russia/moscow')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'investitsii-v-nedvizhimost-v-moskve-kakoy-aktiv-vybrat-v-2025-godu')
THEN
    "Pillar Moscow"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/thailand/phuket')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'investing-in-thai-property-5-proven-strategies-for-5-15-annual-returns')
THEN
    "Pillar Phuket"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/georgia/batumi')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'invest-in-georgia-real-estate-complete-guide-for-2025')
THEN
    "Pillar Batumi"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/cyprus')
THEN
    "Pillar Cyprus"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/turkey')
THEN
    "Pillar Turkey"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/russia/sochi')
THEN
    "Pillar Sochi"


-- Promo UAE (сначала более конкретное, потом общее "/ru/buy/uae")
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/uae/abu-dhabi')
THEN
    "Promo UAE"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/uae')
THEN
    "Promo UAE"


-- Promo Thailand (НИЖЕ Pillar Phuket, иначе "/thailand" съест "/thailand/phuket")
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/buy/thailand')
THEN
    "Promo Thailand"


-- Остальные категории
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/properties')
    OR ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/property')
THEN
    "Property"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/catalog')
THEN
    "Catalog"

-- Spoke = все RU knowledge-center, кроме того, что уже поймалось в Pillar выше
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/ru/knowledge-center/')
THEN
    "Spoke"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], 'about')
THEN
    "About us"

ELSEIF ICONTAINS([referrer_711y], '/contacts')
THEN
    "Contacts"

ELSE
    "Other"
END
